title: B2B stablecoin on/off-ramp homepage
productContext: Fictional early-stage infrastructure provider (product name 'Stablebridge') that lets businesses move between fiat and stablecoins. The product is pre-launch: no public rate card, no published corridor list, no regulatory licences to advertise. Businesses are the primary audience; fintech integrators are the secondary audience. Every URL in this brief is synthetic and uses example.com.
users: cross-border payments lead at a business
treasury operations lead at a business
jobs: understand what the service does for businesses
request access for a business team
evaluate whether an integration is feasible
requiredJourneys: business visitor lands on home and reaches the request-access form
business visitor understands the value proposition above the fold
integrator follows a path from home to the developer overview
constraints: Do not claim regulatory licences, supported corridors, exchange rates, settlement times, or insurance coverage — none are supplied in this brief.
Businesses are the primary audience; the integrator path must remain available without competing with the primary call to action.
Exactly one primary call to action (request access) may appear above the fold; secondary actions must be visually subordinate.
All claims must be supportable from this brief; speculative market sizing, partner counts, or volume figures are forbidden.
The product name Stablebridge is fictional; do not imply affiliation with any real stablecoin issuer, exchange, or regulator.

mobileRules: single primary action above the fold
integrator link collapses into a secondary menu on narrow viewports
code samples stack vertically and remain horizontally scrollable only within their container
primary submit action sits in the bottom thumb zone
required fields remain usable in a single-handed portrait grip
